//: Policy for scripts/check-drift-gate.mjs — the dependency-drift gate that runs the built vg against this package. Tightening or loosening these thresholds is a reviewed action (GUARDRAILS §7): the gate must not be silently weakened.
//allow: typescript lags a major DELIBERATELY: the CLI consumes the TypeScript compiler API (src/reporting/config.ts — createSourceFile, ScriptKind, isPropertyAssignment, …), which the TS 7 native port removes/reshapes, and @typescript-eslint peers still cap at typescript <6.1.0. Revisit when both our API usage and the lint toolchain support TS 7, then delete this allowance.
